project.title: Prison Break Arena
project.description: Top-down action game set in a brutal maximum-security prison.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange prison jumpsuit accents, thick readable silhouettes, white background

asset.name: prison_inmate
asset.description: hardened prison inmate fighter, orange jumpsuit with number patch, shaved head, scarred knuckles, heavy boots, defiant stance, full body single character

plan.prompt: Hardened prison inmate fighter wearing an orange jumpsuit with a number patch, shaved head, scarred knuckles, and heavy boots. Full body, neutral standing pose, facing right, centered, defiant stance. Gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange accents. Thick readable silhouette. Solid white background.
negative_hints: Do not prompt for transparent background or checkerboard.
Do not include multiple characters or action frames.
